subcodes.first_line: O physician of souls! Turn thy noble thoughts for a moment to the healing of hearts and become thou a spiritual healer wholly [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طبیب نفوس فکر مبارک را قدری محول بطبابت قلوب نما و طبیب روحانی شو و بکلی
subcodes.subjects: @health and healing; material and spiritual healing, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @poems and quotation from poetry, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @personal instructions
